exerciseGoals.title: Objetivos de ejercicio
exerciseGoals.emptyState: Set Tu first exercise objetivo to start tracking strength progreso.
exerciseGoals.deleteGoalMessage: This objetivo and its progreso historial will be permanently deleted.

goalTypes.1rmDescription: Set a strength target for a specific exercise.
goalTypes.consistencyDescription: Target a certain number of workouts per week.

creation.title: Nuevo Exercise objetivo
creation.chooseType: What do you want to track?
creation.noHistoryForExercise: No entrenamiento historial yet — we'll start tracking from Tu first session.
creation.projectionFaster: That's {{percent}}% faster than Tu current rate.
creation.projectionSlower: You're ahead of schedule by {{weeks}} weeks.
creation.realisticNudge: This target seems realistic for Tu current level.
creation.ambitiousNudge: That's an ambitious objetivo! It might take some time to get there.

card.stalling: No recent progreso detected. Consider adjusting Tu training.
card.declining: Tu estimated 1RM has trended down recently.
card.insufficientData: Log at least 3 sessions to see a projection.
card.noHistory: No sessions logged yet. Start tracking to see progreso.
card.readyToAchieve: You have the strength to hit this! Go for the 1RM next entrenamiento.

detail.recalculateBaselineConfirmation: Baseline will be updated from {{oldValue}} {{oldUnit}} to {{newValue}} {{newUnit}}. Are you sure you want to do that?
